body:
## Problem

62 article pages have Article JSON-LD (per #1064) with headline, datePublished, author, etc. But the Article schema has no 'about' property linking to the featured drummer's Person entity.

ALBUM_ARTICLES data already has 'relatedDrummerSlug' for most articles (e.g., 'whats-in-mario-duplantiers-kit' has relatedDrummerSlug: 'mario-duplantier'). This semantic bond between the article and the drummer entity is NOT machine-readable in the current JSON-LD output.

Adding 'about: [{@type: Person, name: X, url: metalforge.io/drummer/X}]' makes the entity relationship explicit — Google and LLMs can then understand that this article is authoritative about that specific drummer's gear.

This is the 'article → entity' counterpart to #1357 (profile → article links, HTML level). This operates at the JSON-LD schema level.

## Fix

File: api/meta/[...path].js, ALBUM_ARTICLES return block (line 581-590)

Add 'about' to the existing articleSchema object:
  about: album.relatedDrummerSlug ? [
    {
      '@type': 'Person',
      name: album.relatedDrummerName || album.relatedDrummerSlug,
      url: BASE_URL + '/drummer/' + album.relatedDrummerSlug,
      sameAs: 'https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/' + encodeURIComponent((album.relatedDrummerName || '').replace(/ /g, '_')),
    }
  ] : undefined,

Also add 'mentions' for the band name if available:
  mentions: album.band ? [{ '@type': 'MusicGroup', name: album.band }] : undefined,

Both fields are optional (only render when data is available). No new data files needed — relatedDrummerSlug is already in ALBUM_ARTICLES.

## Expected impact
~50 articles (those with relatedDrummerSlug) gain the about Person link. 12 that lack a slug keep current schema unchanged.

## Estimated organic uplift
- Google entity understanding: article is 'about' this Person → boosts article for drummer-name + gear queries
- LLM citation: AI systems follow 'about' to understand what entity the article describes
- Compounds with #1357 (bidirectional links at HTML level)

## Verify
1. curl https://metalforge.io/api/meta?path=/articles/whats-in-mario-duplantiers-kit returns articleSchema.about with @type:Person
2. Google Rich Results Test on a sample article shows valid Article with about property
3. Articles without relatedDrummerSlug still return valid Article schema (no undefined/null injection)
4. No regression on existing headline/datePublished/breadcrumbSchema fields

## Done
When ~50 articles with relatedDrummerSlug emit Article JSON-LD with 'about': Person entity.
title: SEO: Article JSON-LD — add 'about' property linking to drummer Person entity (62 articles)
